content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Nifty +1.39%, Auto +2.31%, Realty +2.32%, Banks +1.37% leading. VIX down 6% to 16.96 signals reduced fear. Most holdings are in profit and the book is participating well. With 50% deployed and strong unrealized gains, focus is on locking in profits via SL trailing rather than aggressive new adds.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24060,
      "nifty_resistance": 24500
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1045.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +7.7%. Current SL 1045 is already above entry (984) — locked in ~6% gain. Stock is consolidating near day high with intraday strength. SL is well-placed at recent intraday support. No-op MODIFY avoided — keeping existing SL/target. HOLD via position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge at -2.3%. Gold consolidating near highs; US Fed decision today is key risk. SL 119 (~3% below CMP) is appropriate. Hold as portfolio hedge given still-elevated geopolitical risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1448.00,
      "new_target": 1495.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +3.3%, breaking out to 52-week high on strong Q4 (PAT +27%). Tightening SL from 1445 to 1448 (above breakeven, just below VWAP 1452.87 and intraday support). Raising target slightly to 1495 given momentum extension. Lock-in ~2.5% gain minimum."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 401.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Current SL 405 is ABOVE entry 404.50 but ABOVE current CMP 406.15 — that means this SL has effectively already triggered or is at risk of immediate trigger. Loosening SL down to 401 (below intraday low 402.30 and pivot S1 at 396.65 area) — wait, this would loosen SL which is rejected. Reverting: keep current SL 405. Actually with CMP 406.15 and SL 405, we are 0.3% from stop. Cannot loosen. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL 405 is too tight given CMP 406.15 — but cannot loosen per system rules. Letting market decide; if it triggers SL we exit at near-breakeven. NTPCGREEN cluster weakness is a concern. No new action."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1745.00,
      "new_target": 1810.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +1.2%. SL 1742 already at breakeven+. Tightening marginally to 1745 (just below intraday VWAP 1755 and recent consolidation low). Organon $11.75B M&A is strategic but adds leverage risk; 5.3x volume on a +1.19% day suggests distribution. Lock in modest gain."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 319.00,
      "new_target": 335.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +0.5%, near 52-week high. SL 319 already at near-breakeven. No-op MODIFY — keeping existing SL/target. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stock at 322 vs SL 319 — barely 1% buffer. Existing SL/target appropriate. Board meeting April 30 is an event risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 475.00,
      "new_target": 500.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +3.2% with strong Q4 (PAT +11%, dividend Rs 5.25). Up 6.92% today, breaking 52-week high. Trailing SL up from 472 to 475 (above entry 469, locking in 1.3% min gain). Raising target slightly to 500 given breakout momentum and crude tailwind."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 615.00,
      "new_target": 660.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +0.8%. Goes ex-dividend April 30 (Rs 11/share) — mechanical price drop expected tomorrow ~Rs 11. Current SL 615 will likely trigger on ex-div mechanical drop. No-op MODIFY here. Switching to HOLD with awareness."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Ex-dividend Rs 11 tomorrow — mechanical drop will likely take stock to ~605, triggering SL 615. Cannot loosen SL per rules. Will accept mechanical exit if it happens; underlying thesis (LME zinc strength, 57% EBITDA margin) intact for re-entry post ex-div if setup holds."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 250,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 200.00,
      "stop_loss": 191.00,
      "target": 218.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 catalyst: PAT +68% YoY, NIM expansion to 6.2%, GNPA improving. Multiple brokerage upgrades with TPs 190-220 (CLSA Rs 220). Breakout to 52-week high on 1.5x volume. Position size: 250 × 200 = Rs 50,000 (~5% of portfolio). SL 191 (4.5% below) below intraday support 195. Target 218 = 9% upside, R:R 1:2. Risk budget: 5% × 4.5% = 0.22% of portfolio — within limits. Banking sector exposure with PNBHOUSING but different cluster (private bank vs HFC)."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results TODAY post-market — event risk. Avoid entry before earnings; will reassess tomorrow."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up 6.61% to 304.80, well above 52-week high range. Already have NTPC, COALINDIA, HINDZINC, POWERGRID — energy/metal cluster heavy. Adding ONGC would push energy cluster too high. Skip to avoid correlation risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "INDUSINDBK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 turnaround but SFIO probe overhang and accounting fraud concerns are structural red flags. Pass on governance risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "VEDL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 today + demerger record date May 1 = dual event risk with promoter pledge overhang. Already have HINDZINC for metals exposure. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Net profit miss, market share dipped below 40%, stock fell 2% on results. Avoid; chasing a one-day bounce on weak earnings."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ITC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Already have NESTLEIND in FMCG defensive bucket. ITC has cigarette tax overhang on FY27 EPS. Skip to avoid sector concentration."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1045 already locks in 6% gain above entry 984. Stock consolidating near day high — give it room to test target 1110."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; SL 119 appropriate given gold near record highs and Fed decision today."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1448.00,
      "reasoning": "Tightening SL to 1448 (below intraday VWAP support); locks in ~2.5% gain minimum on Q4 breakout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 405 too tight relative to current 406.15 but cannot loosen per rules. Accept mechanical risk; thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1745.00,
      "reasoning": "Marginal tightening from 1742; lock in modest gain given M&A leverage concerns."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 319 already near breakeven; board meeting April 30 — let setup play out."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 475.00,
      "reasoning": "Trailing SL up 3 points after 6.92% breakout day; locks in min 1.3% gain. Strong dividend yield + crude tailwind."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Ex-dividend Rs 11 tomorrow will likely trigger SL 615 mechanically. Acceptable — captures dividend, exits at breakeven net."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BANDHANBNK (entered) primary new add. ONGC, COALINDIA-style energy/metal momentum is being respected via existing book. BAJFINANCE results today — re-evaluate tomorrow if results clean and stock holds 920+. VEDL post-demerger structure may offer cleaner setup after May 2 price discovery. INDUSINDBK passes on governance grounds.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book at 50% deployed, +1.18% on the day, multiple positions in profit. Strategy this tick: lock in gains via SL trailing on the strongest names (NESTLEIND, COALINDIA, SUNPHARMA), let defensive positions (GOLDBEES) and tight-SL names (NTPC, POWERGRID) manage themselves. One new directional add (BANDHANBNK ~5%) on strong Q4 catalyst. Energy/metal cluster heavy — declining additional adds in ONGC/VEDL. Rolling 5-day P&L weak (14% win rate) — being more selective, smaller sizing, tighter risk discipline. Note: 3 pending OPEN orders (GLENMARK, PHARMABEES, TATAPOWER) — leaving alone, will reassess if stale next tick."
}
